specific_location: Prince Lakes, Erie and Thomas Reservoirs
description: Black head down to below the eye.  Completely white on the front from below the bill to the tail coverts.  Blue upper back and dark lower back and wings.  Two very long black tail feathers that showed very clearly both when the bird was perched and especially when it was flying. Very typical flycatcher behavior of chasing after some prey item and then returning to the same perch, or to some other position with a good view.
photographer: Photographer: Christian Nunes, Todd Deininger, David Waltman
